typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		SolutionGroup as string,
		TotalInstances as integer,
		sourcesystem as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	format: 'parquet') ~> iTracker
iTracker derive(import_date = currentTimestamp()) ~> DerivedColumn
DerivedColumn sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	format: 'parquet',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	saveOrder: 1,
	mapColumn(
		SolutionGroup,
		import_date
	)) ~> OLEDBDestination
